list.name: activity
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT activity FROM monitoring.v_public_dashboard_15m ORDER BY 1;

list.name: public_site
list.label: Site
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT public_site FROM monitoring.v_public_dashboard_15m WHERE ('$__all' IN (${activity:sqlstring}) OR activity IN (${activity:sqlstring})) ORDER BY 1;

list.name: public_vo
list.label: VO
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT public_vo FROM monitoring.v_public_dashboard_15m WHERE ('$__all' IN (${activity:sqlstring}) OR activity IN (${activity:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${public_site:sqlstring}) OR public_site IN (${public_site:sqlstring})) ORDER BY 1;

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT public_site) AS value FROM monitoring.v_public_dashboard_15m WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_15m) AND ('$__all' IN (${activity:sqlstring}) OR activity IN (${activity:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${public_site:sqlstring}) OR public_site IN (${public_site:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${public_vo:sqlstring}) OR public_vo IN (${public_vo:sqlstring}));

SELECT SUM(COALESCE(records,0)) AS value FROM monitoring.v_public_dashboard_15m WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_15m) AND ('$__all' IN (${activity:sqlstring}) OR activity IN (${activity:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${public_site:sqlstring}) OR public_site IN (${public_site:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${public_vo:sqlstring}) OR public_vo IN (${public_vo:sqlstring}));

SELECT ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(energy_wh,0)) / 1000.0)::numeric, 3) AS value FROM monitoring.v_public_dashboard_15m WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_15m) AND ('$__all' IN (${activity:sqlstring}) OR activity IN (${activity:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${public_site:sqlstring}) OR public_site IN (${public_site:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${public_vo:sqlstring}) OR public_vo IN (${public_vo:sqlstring}));

SELECT ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(cfp_g,0)) / 1000.0)::numeric, 3) AS value FROM monitoring.v_public_dashboard_15m WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_15m) AND ('$__all' IN (${activity:sqlstring}) OR activity IN (${activity:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${public_site:sqlstring}) OR public_site IN (${public_site:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${public_vo:sqlstring}) OR public_vo IN (${public_vo:sqlstring}));

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(bucket_15m, $__interval), public_site AS metric, SUM(COALESCE(records,0)) AS value FROM monitoring.v_public_dashboard_15m WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_15m) AND ('$__all' IN (${activity:sqlstring}) OR activity IN (${activity:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${public_site:sqlstring}) OR public_site IN (${public_site:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${public_vo:sqlstring}) OR public_vo IN (${public_vo:sqlstring})) GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(bucket_15m, $__interval), public_site AS metric, SUM(COALESCE(energy_wh,0)) / 1000.0 AS value FROM monitoring.v_public_dashboard_15m WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_15m) AND ('$__all' IN (${activity:sqlstring}) OR activity IN (${activity:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${public_site:sqlstring}) OR public_site IN (${public_site:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${public_vo:sqlstring}) OR public_vo IN (${public_vo:sqlstring})) GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2;

SELECT public_vo, activity, public_site, active_since, last_seen, total_records, energy_wh, cfp_g, work, ncores FROM monitoring.v_public_dashboard_resource_listing WHERE ('$__all' IN (${activity:sqlstring}) OR activity IN (${activity:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${public_site:sqlstring}) OR public_site IN (${public_site:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${public_vo:sqlstring}) OR public_vo IN (${public_vo:sqlstring})) ORDER BY activity, public_site, public_vo;

SELECT bucket_15m, public_vo, activity, public_site, records, ROUND(energy_wh::numeric, 3) AS energy_wh, ROUND(cfp_g::numeric, 3) AS cfp_g, ROUND(work::numeric, 3) AS work, ncores FROM monitoring.v_public_dashboard_15m WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_15m) AND ('$__all' IN (${activity:sqlstring}) OR activity IN (${activity:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${public_site:sqlstring}) OR public_site IN (${public_site:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${public_vo:sqlstring}) OR public_vo IN (${public_vo:sqlstring})) ORDER BY bucket_15m DESC, public_site, public_vo LIMIT 500;
